name: YouTube Data API v3
description: The YouTube Data API v3 is an API that provides access to YouTube data, such as videos, playlists, and channels.

capabilities.name: abuse_reports
capabilities.description: Manage abusereports — inserts a new resource into this collection. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: activities
capabilities.description: Manage activities — retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: captions
capabilities.description: Manage captions — inserts a new resource into this collection, updates an existing resource, retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: channels
capabilities.description: Manage channels — updates an existing resource, retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: channel_banners
capabilities.description: Manage channelbanners — inserts a new resource into this collection. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: channel_sections
capabilities.description: Manage channelsections — inserts a new resource into this collection, updates an existing resource, retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: comments
capabilities.description: Manage comments — inserts a new resource into this collection, sets the moderation status of one or more comments, expresses the caller's opinion that one or more comments should be flagged as spam. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: comment_threads
capabilities.description: Manage commentthreads — inserts a new resource into this collection, retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: youtube_v3
capabilities.description: Manage youtube v3 — updates an existing resource. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: youtube_v3_live_chat_messages
capabilities.description: Manage youtube v3 livechat messages — allows a user to load live chat through a server-streamed rpc. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: i18n_languages
capabilities.description: Manage i18nlanguages — retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: i18n_regions
capabilities.description: Manage i18nregions — retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
